meta.title: Workstream Session Attachment
meta.description: Design proposal for session lifecycle, flow:// protocol, and workstream-first hooks

props.content: Sessions are ephemeral. Workstreams are not. This proposal wires the gap: a single attach() call that gives every session a durable identity, survives /clear and compaction, and closes the loop on the lev:// protocol.

props.title: Awaiting Human Approval
props.content: Nothing is implemented until this proposal is approved. Four decisions need human input (see Decisions section).

When an agent starts, clears, or compacts, all context is lost. Handoffs are markdown projections that agents must manually create. The workstream primitive exists (`core/workstream`, `dna/pm/schemas/workstream.yaml`) but isn't wired into session lifecycle.

Hooks exist (SessionStart, Stop, UserPromptSubmit) but don't know about workstreams. The attach/detach events are defined (`WORKSTREAM_ATTACHED`, `WORKSTREAM_AGENT_ADDED`) but never emitted. The result: every session starts cold.

The attachment protocol is hook-driven. The agent never calls attach() directly. SessionStart does it automatically, mapping Claude session_id to a workstream. Minimal surface area for agents — maximum persistence for state.

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Ephemeral: SessionStart hook
    Ephemeral --> Attached: attach(client, session_id)
    Attached --> Named: agent defines workstream
    Named --> Named: /clear (session_id stable)
    Named --> Detached: Stop hook
    Detached --> Attached: SessionStart (same session_id)
    Named --> Completed: workstream.status = completed

props.title: SessionStart
props.content: Read session_id from payload. Look up `.lev/pm/sessions/`. If exists: inject workstream path. If not: create ephemeral registration `{ session_id, client, attached_at, workstream_id: null }`. Inject active workstream context.

props.title: UserPromptSubmit
props.content: If workstream active: inject path into reminder. If no workstream yet: gentle nudge to define work. Replace handoff-centric messaging with workstream-centric.

props.title: Stop
props.content: Look up session → workstream mapping. Interpolate actual path: 'Update workstream at `.lev/pm/workstreams/dna-cascade-dogfood/state/workstream.yaml`'. Never mention handoffs.

items.title: Ephemeral Registration
items.description: Hook creates `.lev/pm/sessions/<id>.yaml` with client type and timestamp. No workstream yet.

items.title: Session → Workstream Binding
items.description: Session registration updated: `workstream_id = <slug>`. Emits WORKSTREAM_SPAWNED + WORKSTREAM_AGENT_ADDED. All subsequent hooks reference the workstream path.

items.title: /clear or Compaction
items.description: Session ID is stable. SessionStart hook re-reads the session registration, finds the workstream, injects the path. Zero context loss.

items.title: Stop → Detach
items.description: Workstream state updated with session summary. WORKSTREAM_DETACHED emitted. Workstream persists for next session.

props.content: Resolution uses the existing flow resolution cascade: entity-local → `.lev/flows/` → `plugins/*/flows/`. Gate 0 in the intent compiler already parses `lev://` URIs (`gate-0.ts:63`). The resolver maps scheme → handler. `flow://` triggers execution. `lev://` resolves to entity paths. `prompt://` loads prompt files.

items.title: Fix graph walker adapter return (lev-pd2w)
items.description: Unblocks all multi-step flows. SDK adapter run() doesn't return to runner.

items.title: Fix Poly namespace routing (lev-vcoj)
items.description: Unblocks lev workstream CLI. Discovery flattens namespaces.

items.title: Wire Stop → workstream path interpolation
items.description: Replace handoff messaging with workstream path.

items.title: Add flow:// to Gate 0 + resolver
items.description: Extend URI pattern, add flow execution resolver.

items.title: Structured YAML node outputs (not markdown)
items.description: Entity lifecycle states for cascade artifacts.

items.title: Stewardess heartbeat
items.description: Haiku agent checks node health on interval.

props.title: 1. Session State Location
props.content:
`.lev/pm/sessions/` (PM concern — sessions are identity) or `.lev/exec/sessions/` (runtime concern — sessions are ephemeral execution)?

**Recommendation:** `.lev/pm/sessions/` — sessions map to workstreams which are PM entities.

props.title: 2. URI Scheme
props.content:
`flow://X` as a separate scheme, or `lev://flow/X` under the `lev://` umbrella?

**Recommendation:** `lev://flow/X` — one protocol, one resolver, one spec. Schemes are `lev://flow/`, `lev://workstream/`, `lev://spec/`, `lev://prompt/`.

props.title: 3. attach() Surface
props.content:
CLI call (`lev session attach`) or purely hook-driven (no agent action needed)?

**Recommendation:** Hook-driven. The agent never calls attach. The SessionStart hook does it automatically. Zero agent surface area.

props.title: 4. Dolt Hub for Beads
props.content:
Get a DoltHub remote to stop the `bd dolt push` noise, or suppress the warning?

**Recommendation:** Suppress for now. Add `dolt_remote: none` to beads config. Real sync comes with the workstream backend portability (CMS backends).
